description_long: This lamp features a rectangular wooden platform composed of parallel planks, with a central copper or brass pipe structure rising vertically from the middle. The pipe forms a squared arch, supporting a single exposed bulb at its apex, and is anchored to the wooden base with visible mounting hardware. The lamp's design is minimalist and industrial, with the warm tones of the wood contrasting against the metallic sheen of the pipe. A visible power cord extends from the base of the pipe, suggesting a plug-in electrical connection. The overall construction is low-profile and wide, making it suitable for placement on large surfaces or as a statement piece in open urban environments. The lamp's aesthetic is modern, with a focus on clean lines and functional materials.
description: A modern lamp with a wide wooden plank base and a central copper pipe arch holding an exposed bulb. The design is minimalist and industrial, featuring a visible power cord and mounting hardware.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen from the end of the wooden planks, highlighting the linear arrangement and the central copper pipe structure.
description_view_1: The lamp is viewed from the side, showing the full width of the wooden base and the squared copper arch with the bulb at its center.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, again emphasizing the parallel wooden planks and the central mounting of the lamp structure.
description_view_3: The lamp is seen from the opposite side of view 1, displaying the copper arch and the exposed bulb, with the power cord visible.
